TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Kaala, title = Kaala, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kaala} }

S.FORM: Kaala (Dipun a kamu: Gaara, „ā¨„āĘ„É©, śąĎśĄõÁĺÖ) u tademaw nu nikulitan nu Dipun Naluto ÁĀęŚĹĪŚŅćŤÄÖ, sakalima a tumuk nu likelikenan a niyazu', u satenasay a tumuk nu kikelikenan a niyazu'. u Isita Akila (Dipun a kamu: Áü≥ÁĒįŚĹį „ĀĄ„Āó„Ā† „Āā„Āć„āČ) ku pangiha'ay nida. patetek nida wayway: kaymaw tu udip (sakacacay a pu), śÖąśĄõ (sakatusa a pu) maydih a milalubuay: Uciha Sasuke (sakacacay a pu), maydih milalubu tu ada(sakatusa a pu) kaydihan a kakanen: Á≤ČŤāĚ, niid'idan a sema nu katalalan. kabidangan a kakanen: yukan atu sicedan a lice kahenulan a tademaw: Taymali , Kankulo kaydihan a kamu: kaymaw tu udip(sakacacay a pu),śÖąśĄõ (sakatusa a pu) malkakaay: Naluto, Uciha Sasuke, Taymali , Kankulo wayway nu icelang: sibali, sikelekeleng, silala' nanu adidi'ay a nakauzip ninticu wayway nida i manmangaan sakacacay a pu mitanengan nu sakakaay a ninja sakatusa a pu malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan weykipayke- ÁĀęŚĹĪŚŅćŤÄÖ
S.PHON: kaar~…ĺa (dipun a kamu: gaara, ***, ***) u tad…ômaw nu nikur~…ĺitan nu dipun nar~…ĺuto ****, sakar~…ĺima a tumuk nu r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a nijazu Ē~ °, u sat…ônasaj a tumuk nu kik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a nijazu Ē~ °. u isita akir~…ĺa (dipun a kamu: *** *** ***) ku paŇčińßa Ē~ °aj nida. pat…ôt…ôk nida wajwaj: kajmaw tu udip (saka ¶a ¶aj a pu), ** (sakatusa a pu) majdińß a mir~…ĺar~…ĺubuaj: u ¶ińßa sasuk…ô (saka ¶a ¶aj a pu), majdińß mir~…ĺar~…ĺubu tu ada(sakatusa a pu) kajdińßan a kakan…ôn: **, niid Ē~ °idan a s…ôma nu katar~…ĺar~…ĺan. kabidaŇčan a kakan…ôn: jukan atu si ¶…ôdan a r~…ĺi ¶…ô kańß…ônur~…ĺan a tad…ômaw: tajmar~…ĺi , kankur~…ĺo kajdińßan a kamu: kajmaw tu udip(saka ¶a ¶aj a pu),** (sakatusa a pu) mar~…ĺkakaaj: nar~…ĺuto, u ¶ińßa sasuk…ô, tajmar~…ĺi , kankur~…ĺo wajwaj nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: sibar~…ĺi, sik…ôr~…ĺ…ôk…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč, sir~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nanu adidi Ē~ °aj a nakauzip ninti ¶u wajwaj nida i manmaŇčaan saka ¶a ¶aj a pu mitan…ôŇčan nu sakakaaj a ninja sakatusa a pu mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan w…ôkipajk…ô- ****
S.FORM: Kaala (Dipun a kamu: Gaara, „ā¨„āĘ„É©, śąĎśĄõÁĺÖ) u tademaw nu nikulitan nu Dipun Naluto ÁĀęŚĹĪŚŅćŤÄÖ, sakalima a tumuk nu likelikenan a niyazu', u satenasay a tumuk nu kikelikenan a niyazu'. u Isita Akila (Dipun a kamu: Áü≥ÁĒįŚĹį „ĀĄ„Āó„Ā† „Āā„Āć„āČ) ku pangiha'ay nida. patetek nida wayway: kaymaw tu udip (sakacacay a pu), śÖąśĄõ (sakatusa a pu) maydih a milalubuay: Uciha Sasuke (sakacacay a pu), maydih milalubu tu ada(sakatusa a pu) kaydihan a kakanen: Á≤ČŤāĚ, niid'idan a sema nu katalalan. kabidangan a kakanen: yukan atu sicedan a lice kahenulan a tademaw: Taymali , Kankulo kaydihan a kamu: kaymaw tu udip(sakacacay a pu),śÖąśĄõ (sakatusa a pu) malkakaay: Naluto, Uciha Sasuke, Taymali , Kankulo wayway nu icelang: sibali, sikelekeleng, silala' nanu adidi'ay a nakauzip ninticu wayway nida i manmangaan sakacacay a pu mitanengan nu sakakaay a ninja sakatusa a pu malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan weykipayke- ÁĀęŚĹĪŚŅćŤÄÖ
S.PHON: kaar~…ĺa (dipun a kamu: gaara, ***, ***) u tad…ômaw nu nikur~…ĺitan nu dipun nar~…ĺuto ****, sakar~…ĺima a tumuk nu r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a nijazu Ē~ °, u sat…ônasaj a tumuk nu kik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a nijazu Ē~ °. u isita akir~…ĺa (dipun a kamu: *** *** ***) ku paŇčińßa Ē~ °aj nida. pat…ôt…ôk nida wajwaj: kajmaw tu udip (saka ¶a ¶aj a pu), ** (sakatusa a pu) majdińß a mir~…ĺar~…ĺubuaj: u ¶ińßa sasuk…ô (saka ¶a ¶aj a pu), majdińß mir~…ĺar~…ĺubu tu ada(sakatusa a pu) kajdińßan a kakan…ôn: **, niid Ē~ °idan a s…ôma nu katar~…ĺar~…ĺan. kabidaŇčan a kakan…ôn: jukan atu si ¶…ôdan a r~…ĺi ¶…ô kańß…ônur~…ĺan a tad…ômaw: tajmar~…ĺi , kankur~…ĺo kajdińßan a kamu: kajmaw tu udip(saka ¶a ¶aj a pu),** (sakatusa a pu) mar~…ĺkakaaj: nar~…ĺuto, u ¶ińßa sasuk…ô, tajmar~…ĺi , kankur~…ĺo wajwaj nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: sibar~…ĺi, sik…ôr~…ĺ…ôk…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč, sir~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nanu adidi Ē~ °aj a nakauzip ninti ¶u wajwaj nida i manmaŇčaan saka ¶a ¶aj a pu mitan…ôŇčan nu sakakaaj a ninja sakatusa a pu mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan w…ôkipajk…ô- ****
